---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem so we can fix it
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

## To reproduce

Steps or the exact command, e.g.:

```bash
chorale --agent research "..."
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior / output

Paste the relevant output or error (redact any secrets).

## Environment

- OS: <!-- e.g. Windows 11 / Ubuntu 24.04 / macOS 15 -->
- Node version: <!-- node -v -->
- Model / provider used: <!-- e.g. ollama:qwen3:4b, hf:Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct -->
- Chorale commit / version:

## Additional context

Anything else that might help (config snippet with secrets removed, agent.md, etc.).
